*highlighted section*  
the program will generate a complex pattern by combining a sequence of numbers with a geometric shape. the sequence will be generated using a mathematical formula that ensures the numbers are evenly spaced. the geometric shape will be drawn using a loop that iterates through a defined range of values. the loop will calculate the position of each number in the pattern and determine its placement based on the formula.

*highlighted section*  
the program will use a two-dimensional array to store the pattern. each element in the array will represent a part of the pattern, and the array will be filled with numbers according to the formula. the array will be printed to the console in a formatted manner, with each row representing a different part of the pattern. the formatting will ensure that the numbers are aligned and the pattern is visually clear.

*highlighted section*
